{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Union strike team
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Union strike team]] included at least one [[Archmage]] and another mage of comparable level.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c13">''The Captain'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Professor Vallenar]] destroyed a [[Union strike team]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c22">''The Captain'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
